title: Považská Bystrica、Trenčín Region — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Považská Bystrica、Trenčín Regionの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Považská BystricaはTrenčín Regionにある人口39,000の都市です。An industrial town in northwestern Slovakia, known for its engineering and manufacturing sector, and a strategic location in the Váh River valley.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
